lines.speaker: Duel Guide
lines.text: Welcome to the Emir's Arena! Are you interested in Duels? We organise ranked Duels here, or alternatively you can organise your own unranked Duels.

lines.speaker: Duel Guide
lines.text: Two fighters are placed in a combat arena together, to battle to the death. The survivor wins the Duel.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ranked or unranked? What does that mean?

lines.speaker: Duel Guide
lines.text: Everyone has a rank. It's meant to indicate how good they are at fighting, compared to other people.

lines.speaker: Duel Guide
lines.text: In ranked fights, the winners gain rank and the losers lose rank. The Arena staff will decide who'll be fighting in each ranked Duel, and send the invitations.

lines.speaker: Duel Guide
lines.text: But if you just want some casual fun, you can have an unranked Duel, where no-one gains or loses rank. You can organise your own unranked Duel against whoever you want to fight.

lines.speaker: Duel Guide
lines.text: Only the ranked fights offer access to the other rewards of the Arena.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get invited to a Duel?

lines.speaker: Duel Guide
lines.text: For a ranked Duel, you'll need to sign up to the recruitment group...

lines.speaker: Duel Guide
lines.text: You can carry on with your adventures while you're waiting for a ranked Duel to begin, since it may be a while before suitable fighters are available.

lines.speaker: Duel Guide
lines.text: For an unranked Duel, other people might challenge you while you're wandering around the PvP Arena, so keep an eye out for invitation messages.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I want to organise my own Duel.

lines.speaker: Duel Guide
lines.text: When you see other people wandering around the PvP Arena, you can challenge them directly, and they can challenge you. This would be an unranked Duel, so neither of you would gain rank or earn rewards.
